name: X-Golf Noblesville
address: 13904 Town Center Blvd Suite 700, Noblesville, IN 46060
about: X-Golf Noblesville features state-of-the-art indoor golf simulators offering unparalleled accuracy and realism through a combination of camera systems, infrared lasers, impact sensors, and advanced gaming software. The venue operates with a pay-per-simulator-hour model and can accommodate up to 6 people per bay, providing a flexible environment for casual play, training, and events. The facility includes a full bar and food menu, making it suitable for groups looking for a combination of golf, dining, and socializing.
why_golfers_like_it: World's most accurate golf simulator technology
Flexible pricing model accommodating up to 6 players per bay
Full-service venue with dining, bar, and event hosting capabilities

food_and_drink.notes: Full bar food menu with shareable bites, appetizers, snacks, and pizzas
Full bar with beer by the glass or on tap, cocktails, and wines

simulator_hardware.notes: Combination of camera systems, infrared lasers, impact sensors

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, rental clubs are available, though you are encouraged to bring your own.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, the venue has a full bar and food menu available for purchase.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Generally takes about 1 hour for an individual player to complete 18 holes. For multiple players, you may want to book an additional hour per player.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, children of all ages are welcome, and junior lessons are available for ages 16 and under.
